title: Use of English – 2025 Acceso Titular B

questions.prompt: I’ve never been to a more interesting city than London.
answers: The most interesting city I have been to is London.
The most interesting city I've been to is London.
The most interesting city I have ever been to is London.
The most interesting city I've ever been to is London.

questions.prompt: If he doesn’t wear a hat, he’ll get sunburned.
answers: Unless he wears a hat, he will get sunburned
Unless he wears a hat, he'll get sunburned

questions.prompt: When I dance flamenco, I feel happy.
answers: Dancing flamenco makes me feel happy.

questions.prompt: Vince’s photographs are being shown at the exhibition.
answers: They are showing Vince's photographs at the exhibition.

questions.prompt: If I were you, I would eat healthier food.
answers: You had better eat healthier food.

questions.prompt: The groom didn’t buy the engagement ring because it was really expensive.
answers: It was such an expensive engagement ring that the groom did not buy it.

It was such an expensive engagement ring that the groom couldn't buy it.

2021 was the year when I was promoted.
2021 was the year that I was promoted.

questions.prompt: My brother asked me if he could borrow $50 until the following Friday.
answers: ‘Can I borrow $50 until next Friday?’ my brother asked me.
‘Can you lend me $50 until next Friday?’ my brother asked me.

questions.prompt: My parents will celebrate their twenty-fifth wedding anniversary in November.
questions.instruction: By the end of the year, ...
answers: By the end of the year, my parents will have celebrated their twenty-fifth anniversary.

By the end of the year, my parents will have been married for twenty-five years.
By the end of the year, my parents'll have been married for twenty-five years.
